Implementation_Details: Provides access to selected DB objects (DasObject) and file system APIs.

Semantic_Intent: Maps SQL regex patterns to Java types
Implementation_Details: Regex map: int->long, float/double/decimal/real->double, datetime/timestamp->java.sql.Timestamp, date->java.sql.Date, time->java.sql.Time, fallback->String.

Semantic_Intent: Triggers generation pipeline via UI prompt
Implementation_Details: Filters IDE SELECTION for DasTable instances, iterates, and calls generate(table, dir).

Semantic_Intent: Prepares metadata and handles file I/O
Implementation_Details: Resolves className via javaName(), parses columns via calcFields(), opens PrintWriter for ClassName.java.
Outputs package declaration, class definition, private fields, and standard getter/setter methods to the stream.
Iterates DasUtil.getColumns, applies lower-case regex match against typeMapping, returns array of field maps (name, type, annos).

Semantic_Intent: Converts DB naming to Java conventions
Implementation_Details: Splits string by words using NameUtil, applies PascalCase (if capitalize=true) or camelCase (if capitalize=false).
